detail.heading: Review detail
detail.subtitle: Review the original patient rating, the public rating, and the moderation decision before publishing.
detail.excludedFromAverage: Does not count in practitioner average
detail.internalOnlyNote: This is internal only and is not shown to the patient or public users.
detail.visibilityNote: The public rating is what counts toward the practitioner average.
detail.publicRatingHint: This is the rating that will be shown publicly if the review is approved with edits.

moderation.heading: Moderation decision
moderation.note: Choose the decision that matches the review outcome. The original patient rating is always preserved.
moderation.reasonPlaceholder: Write the internal reason or note here
moderation.reasonRequiredHint: This reason is required for this decision.
moderation.error: Could not update the moderation decision. Please try again.

APPROVE_AS_IS.title: Approve as-is
APPROVE_AS_IS.description: Publish the original patient rating without changing it.

EDIT_AND_APPROVE.title: Edit and approve
EDIT_AND_APPROVE.description: Keep the original patient rating internally, then publish the public rating you choose.

REJECT_PUBLISHING.title: Reject publishing
REJECT_PUBLISHING.description: Keep the review internal and do not include it in the public average.

INTERNAL_NOTE_ONLY.title: Internal note only
INTERNAL_NOTE_ONLY.description: Keep this decision internal only and do not show it publicly.

EXCLUDE_FROM_PUBLIC_AVERAGE.title: Exclude from public average
EXCLUDE_FROM_PUBLIC_AVERAGE.description: Keep the review internal but do not count it in the practitioner average.

labels.excludedFromAverage: Does not count in practitioner average

validation.publicRatingRequired: Choose the public rating shown to everyone.
validation.publicRatingRange: The public rating must be between 1 and 5.
validation.moderationReasonRequired: Write the reason for this decision.

empty.heading: No reviews match these filters
empty.note: Try another status or turn off moderation-only filtering.

listError.heading: Reviews are not available right now

detail.title: Review detail — Admin
detail.description: View and moderate a submitted review.

ratingModal.title: Rate your session
ratingModal.subtitle: Choose a star rating. You can add a note if you want.
ratingModal.notePlaceholder: Write a note if you want...
ratingModal.validationRatingRequired: Please choose a star rating first

reminder.modalTitle: You can leave feedback for your completed session
reminder.modalDescription: Your session is finished and your feedback helps us improve care quality.
reminder.sessionNote: Please share feedback for your recent session with {practitioner}.

list.title: My feedback — Patient
list.description: See your submitted session feedback and follow what happened to each one.

detail.title: Feedback detail — Patient
detail.description: Review your submitted feedback details for this session.

list.title: Session feedback history
list.note: Track the feedback you already submitted after completed sessions. This page is visibility-only and does not edit or delete reviews.
list.count: {value, number} {value, plural, one {feedback item} other {feedback items}}
list.noText: No written note was submitted for this feedback.

boundaries.heading: What this page covers
boundaries.note: This page shows your submitted feedback status and details only. New feedback is still submitted from eligible session flow.

detail.note: This is the submitted record as saved for your session.

nextStep.heading: Need to leave more feedback later
nextStep.note: When another session is completed and eligible, you can submit feedback from your session details.

error.heading: Feedback details are not available right now

empty.heading: No feedback submitted yet
empty.note: After an eligible completed session, your submitted feedback will appear here.

error.heading: Your feedback history is not available right now

errors.generic: Something went wrong while loading your feedback.
errors.profileNotFound: Your patient profile is not ready yet. Please try again shortly.
errors.notFound: This feedback item was not found in your account.
errors.sessionNotFound: This session could not be found in your account.
errors.sessionNotCompleted: Feedback can only be submitted after session completion.
errors.sessionNotPaid: Feedback is available after the session payment is completed.
errors.alreadyReviewed: You already submitted feedback for this session.
